age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Social Work / Rural Development / Women Studies / Social Sciences, Full time degree for Block level
qualification.details: State Project Manager (SRP): Any degree in Social Work / Rural Development / Women Studies or Social Sciences. Priority to women and SHG federation members. District Project Manager (DRP): Any degree in Social Work / Rural Development / Women Studies or Social Sciences. Priority to women and SHG federation members. Block Project Manager (BRP): Any full-time degree. Priority to women and SHG federation members.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TNSRLM Ariyalur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tncdw.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TNSRLM Ariyalur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the TNSRLM Ariyalur Project Manager posts is 29th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Manager posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for Project Manager posts in the Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Ariyalur recruitment drive. These include State Project Manager, District Project Manager, and Block Project Manager positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Block Project Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Block Project Manager (BRP) position, candidates need to possess any full-time degree. The notification also specifies a priority for women and SHG federation members.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all Project Manager posts is between 25 years and 45 years as of 01-06-2026. Specific age criteria might apply for different roles as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for TNSRLM Ariyalur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Manager posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Manager posts will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the final selection.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the State Project Manager (SRP) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the State Project Manager (SRP) post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 25,000/-. This is the highest salary offered among the Project Manager positions in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification is for Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Ariyalur. While not explicitly stated, government job notifications are typically for residents of the state. Candidates should check the official notification for specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the TNSRLM Ariyalur Project Manager recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Tamil Nadu Department of Rural Development and Panchayat Raj, which is https://tncdw.org. The direct link to the website is provided in the Important Links section.
